ddls:
CREATE TABLE "control_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control parameter */,
  "variable" TEXT /* Control variable name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the control parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the control parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the control parameter */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the control parameter */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the control parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the control parameter was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the control parameter */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the control parameter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hvac_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HVAC system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the HVAC system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the HVAC system within the building */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of HVAC system */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the HVAC system */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the HVAC system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the HVAC system was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the HVAC system expires */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HVAC system controlling the zone */,
  "current_temperature" REAL /* Current temperature in the zone */,
  "target_temperature" REAL /* Target temperature for the zone */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the zone in square meters */,
  "occupancy" INTEGER /* Number of people currently in the zone */,
  "occupancy_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy capacity of the zone */,
  "last_occupied_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the zone was last occupied */,
  "current_humidity" REAL /* Current relative humidity in the zone */,
  "target_humidity" REAL /* Target relative humidity for the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES hvac_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, maintenance staff, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building automation system being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the system was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_access_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES hvac_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building automation system affected */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control parameter changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the log entry was created */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Previous value of the control parameter */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the control parameter */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Brief description of why the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES hvac_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES control_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building system consuming energy */,
  "consumption_date" TEXT /* Date of energy consumption */,
  "consumption_time" TEXT /* Time of energy consumption */,
  "energy_used" REAL /* Amount of energy used (in kWh) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of energy consumed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of energy (e.g., grid, solar) */,
  "energy_saved" REAL /* Amount of energy saved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES hvac_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building system requiring maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the maintenance activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the maintenance activity in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES hvac_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building system generating the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alerted_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user or team to which the alert was sent */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was first addressed */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES hvac_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alerted_to FOREIGN KEY ("alerted_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building system analyzed in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the full report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., energy consumption, performance) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES hvac_systems ("system_id")
)
